zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Vivonne於1257年出生在英國薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘時，她的父親William de Forz36歲，母親Maud de Ferrers28歲。她於大約1270年與John de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1321年1月10日在英國薩默塞特享年64歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily de Vivonne于1257年出生在英国薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘时，她的父亲William de Forz36岁，母亲Maud de Ferrers28岁。她于大约1270年与John de Beauchamp在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1321年1月10日在英国薩默塞特享年64岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Vivonne was born in 1257, in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, her father, William de Forz, was 36 and her mother, Maud de Ferrers, was 28. She married John de Beauchamp about 1270, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 10 January 1321, in Somerset, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Vivonne est née en 1257, à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William de Forz, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maud de Ferrers, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John de Beauchamp environ 1270, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1321, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, Unit: Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Vivonne 1257 in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Forz 36 und ihre Mutter Maud de Ferrers 28. Sie hat um 1270 in England, United Kingdom John de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1321 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Vivonne è nata il nel 1257 nel Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, sua padre, William de Forz, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Maud de Ferrers, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John de Beauchamp circa 1270, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1321, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Vivonneが1257年にイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップで生まれた時，父William de Forzは36歳，母Maud de Ferrersは28歳であった。約1270年にイギリスイギリスでJohn de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1321年1月10日にイギリスソメルセトで64歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Vivonne(이)가 1257년 영국 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Forz(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Ferrers(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 1월 10일 영국 서머세트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Vivonne nasceu em 1257, em Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Forz, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Ferrers, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1321, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, Unit: Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Vivonne родилась в 1257 г. в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Forz было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Ferrers, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Beauchamp около 1270 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 10 января 1321 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Vivonne nació en 1257, en Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Forz, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maud de Ferrers, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1270, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1321, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Somerset, Inglaterra.
